description_long: This object is a slender knife with a long, narrow, and pointed blade made of dark metal, ideal for slicing or piercing tasks. The blade is straight and tapers smoothly to a sharp tip, with a consistent width along most of its length. The handle is crafted from a warm-toned wood, featuring a cylindrical shape with rounded ends and subtle carved grooves for grip. The wood grain is visible, adding a natural texture and visual interest to the handle. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, giving it a streamlined appearance. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative ornamentation or embellishments.
description: A long, straight-bladed knife with a dark metal blade and a rounded wooden handle, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, pointed blade and the cylindrical wooden handle.
description_view_1: Blade tip view highlighting the blade's narrow width and the rounded end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's straight edge and the handle's wood grain and rounded ends.
description_view_3: Handle-end view focusing on the handle's rounded shape and carved grip details.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical wooden handle with rounded ends and carved grip grooves
